contentPattern.structure: horizontal sequence of ordered step items (image/label per step) laid out left-to-right on desktop, stacked on mobile

suitableFor: 'Our Process' style horizontal step flows on ad landing pages
ordered multi-step diagrams where each step is a labeled image
left-to-right process/journey rows on a colored background
reuseGuidance.note: Source rendered steps as pre-composed images with arrow connectors between them. This variant models each step as a card item; arrow connectors can be added via CSS or authored as separate inline images if needed.
